memory_entries.text: SQLite product review dataset: g1 is primarily Office Products. Tables include items_g1(ref_id, ttl, avg_rtg, avg_rtg_30d, rtg_ct, prc, str_nm, main_cat, desc_txt, feat_lst), fdbk_g1(id,item_id,ref_id,uid,rtg,ttl,body,ts,hlp_ct,vrf INTEGER), attrs_g1, taxn_g1, fdbk_stats_g1. In g1, missing text verification label corresponds to fdbk_g1.vrf=0, and products archived/no longer offered correspond to items_g1.prc IS NULL. For office-product missing-label reviews: total 16603, archived 4791, pct 28.9.
